reviews.review_text: Stayed at park 3 nights didn't realise you can't smoke on ground's anymore so you have to go out the front. Not very safe when you have drunks and idiots walking past at night, I hope nobody gets attacked or hurt out there just having a cigarette
The managers helped me start my flat battery car and I'll forever be grateful. The husband and wife are so lovely. Hope you guys enjoy the new car!
Wonderful great clean safe campground, best location in all of burliegh 💓💓💓

Great spot to base yourself, service from the staff second to none, loved our cabin & facilities.
Easy to walk to BURLEIGH & once tram is done getting up the coast will be a breeze.
Love to see the park add green bin for food waste with recycling & general waste.

Great Location. Well maintained park. Amenities clean and spacious. Walk to beach, restaurants, shops etc. There is still a lot of road works outside park due to Light Rail being built and they did night work a couple of nights during our weeklong stay. |Very annoying at 3.00am when trying to sleep. Burleigh Heads so beautiful you can almost overlook this slight inconvenience. Still ok to get caravan in through roadworks.

Friendly staff.
Facilities well maintained.
My cabin was spacious, clean & comfortable. The park is well maintained & in an excellent location.
Excellent location and amenities. Only some 100m to South Burleigh beach.
Not the promised lux but damaged floors and walls. No egg turner, pots and pans filthy. Great location just maintenance needs doing. Expect more for the price.
Great location very friendly staff and camp sites look good plenty of room for kid's too roam around
Great caravan park in a great location.

very tight camp sites
road works ATM very noisy
Grounds are lovely and staff are helpful and super accommodating to extra needs.
Pristine location with great staff

I understand that the tram works is outside of the parks control however it was exceptionally loud and went on all night!! I would seriously reconsider staying here while the works is going on!
The location is very good, the ablutions old (fine, but could also be cleaner…!), and the staff are friendly.
Nice accommodation, clean,and handy to all.
Location is great of course, but be prepared for serious night noise from the Tram road works and the over zealous park groundsmen during the morning.

I drove from Goulburn to Brisbane in my truck and ran out of hours to continue. I was lucky enough to pull up next to the park, and the groundskeeper and staff went above and beyond to find me a site to stay on — even during such a busy time.

Couldn’t be more grateful for their help and kindness.

A huge thank you from me and the entire Racesafe team we truly appreciate it!

Highly recommended and will be back!

Fabulous location right on Burleigh heads… a short walk to the beach, shops, good coffee and great walking paths. The park is all location location location. Amenities clean and tidy and friendly staff. Love every single visit here, it’s our favourite Gold Coast tourist park

Burleigh Beach Caravan Park is one of the best locations on the Gold Coast |Very centrally located for restaurants, shops, beaches  and Tallebudgera Creek |Very helpful and friendly staff |Clean and modern amenities |Very reasonable tariff |We have many times in the past and still rate this as one of the best on the GC
Amazing park, so convenient to a heap of beautiful restaurants and cafes! Would highly recommend this park and amazing location!

Burleigh Beach Tourist Park is in a fantastic location, right on both the surf and swimming beaches. It is right in the heart of Burleigh Heads with clubs and restaurants within easy walking distance.|The amenities are modern and always clean as is the whole park. Staff are super helpful and friendly.
Great caravan park, staff friendly and helpful, clean amenities, good location for beach, shops and restaurants and cheap (50cents) easy bus and light rail ride to Surfers.
Comfortable cabin, over the road from a beautiful beach and parks for children. Staff were very helpful and pleasant. We liked there was an after-hours number, in case of problems.
Stayed in our caravan on the site with lovely sun in the mornings . Most of the sites are roomy and easy to get into and out of
Great caravan park, though we struggled to get our 21ft caravan out as the roads were extremely narrow.
Great service

Never disappoints. Tucked away yet close to everything. Facilities are always very clean including BBQ and kitchen areas and the staff are friendly and helpful. There were activities for the kids in the TV room over the holidays or they just rode around with the many other kids on site. Beautiful location.

Beautiful well maintained caravan park in a fantastic location.
Staff are friendly and helpful and go out of their way to accommodate any request. Looking forward to our next stay.

Great caravan park. Close to awesome Burleigh surf beach, one block walk into town with great places to eat and lots of shopping destinations.|Nice walk around the mountain to Tallebudgera and stunning views of the ocean.|Loved our stay here, we will be back.
Stayed on a powered site with concrete slab and was still able to set up the annexe.great location easy walk to the beach, shops, cafes and restaurants.have rebooked and look forward to returning.
Excellent location will be going back there again.
Clean, spacious and quiet. Good parking, easy walk to restaurants and shops.
Nice quiet park handy to everything Greta beach across the road and very clean amenities. A well cared for park with large sites.

Close to the beach and wonderful coastal walks.
Plenty of places to eat.
Is close to the main road. After A few days you get used to it.

Stayed in a 2 bedroom Cabin.
Well fitted out, and a nice quiet location.
Very central location, and only a short walk to the beach, cafes and top restaurants.
Certainly come back for another stay!
Camped here in our van in October. Fantastic location right over the road from the beach and surf lookout and close to all the shops. Bathroom facilities were clean and modern.

We have stayed many times -and will continue to stay at Burleigh Beach Tourist Park in our caravan.   There’s so much about this park that we enjoy and can highly recommend.

The location is superb - being over the road from Burleigh Beach and the walking tracks of the National Park.   We appreciate the easy walk to the supermarket and the variety of cafes, restaurants and clubs nearby.

Reception staff are so welcoming and ground staff keep the park and amenities very clean and well maintained.   The managers - Matt and Laura go above and beyond to make this park a standout.

Stayed for five nights in our camper van, powered site and it was everything you could ask for.

Site was clean, mostly level once we got the van next to the concrete pad. Amenities were clean albeit quite dated, hey they served their purpose and the water pressure was good with hot water!

Staff were cool on my three interactions, and other guests were considerate and well mannered.

Will be back again at another time, nice location and value for money!
Park and van sites very spacious and well maintained.  Amenities spacious and clean. So close to beach and national park.

Enjoyed a 3 night stay with my family. Plenty of towels, soap, shampoo/ conditioner, face washers and tea towels which was amazing!
Fantastic clean amenities along with the grounds being super well maintained. Loved being so close to the beach and walking distance to shops.
Reception staff lovely and helpful. Bonus was the meal voucher for the surf club.
Our cabin was comfortable. Beds clean and well made.
Our outdoor BBQ was playing up so couldn’t cook our snags and some of the walls inside our villa could do with a good scrub. But I would still Definitely recommend staying here.
2 week stay in my van

One the best places to stay with your family. Close to the beach, pub shops and transport to the theme parks. Has boom gate although as always lock up. Toilet are clean daily and dose get expensive in peak times

We had the best stay at Burleigh Beach Tourist park. The staff were exceptional and so helpful and friendly. The amenities are very clean, and everything is maintained extremely well. The grounds are well looked after, and the location is perfect. This is definitely the best park on the Gold Coast and our favourite place to stay.
Our caravan was our room, staff at park very helpful although they did start maintenance early which was a bit noisey.
only downfall no wifi we had not got Au SIM cards yet but otherwise great stay!

We had a powered site for the week. Excellent facilities. Fabulous location. Short walk to James Street shops and cafes. Just over the road from the Surf Club and the coastal walk between Burleigh Heads and Tallebudgerah stunning views.

Great location across the road from the beach and next to the centre of town. The staff are very friendly and helpful. The amenities are some of the best you'll find. The BBQ area is excellent as is the kids rec room. The camp kitchen is old, diffcult to find and no hot water from the taps. Ditto in the rec room. A zip provided boiling water though. High recommended.
Stayed in a Caravan

Love, love, love this place.  My family and I have been here a number of times and it's our go-to place for camping on the Gold Coast.  It's in the best location; 5-minute walking distance to the best sunset you'll see on the Coast.  5 minutes' walk to the Burleigh Pavillion, the beach, and the Burleigh National Park walking path.  Kids will love it here, there's no pool, but when you're on the beach's doorstep, you won't need one.  Very clean and tidy amenities and friendly staff with great local knowledge.

Visiting relatives here,who come up every year and this is their favourite spot, me too the park is wonderful always clean and tidy and just a few hundred metres away from the beach.Just an update, beautiful day once again.
I visited my Aunt who was staying here.  The park seems very nice and the shower/toilet block were nice and clean.
Fantastic location ti explore burleigh and surrounding areas. Great facilities, super clean. Will be back for sure

We highly recommend the Burleigh Tourist park.
We recently stayed in a two story apartment style deluxe cabin that was well maintained, clean and tidy.
Donna in the office reception was amazing and found us accommodation that perfectly suited our needs.
Lisa and Chris

We love Burleigh Beach Tourist Park. We stay here all the time when we come to Burleigh.  Donna, in the office, is always helpful and accomodating and she has a great follow up service. The park is well maintained by the ground crew, who are friendly and always happy to assist with maintenance of our site.  The amenities are always clean and tidy and regularly serviced.  We highly recommend Burleigh Tourist Park to anyone needing accommodation in Burleigh.

Brett & Jo
Great location and friendly staff. Will be back for sure.

Glad we chose this caravan park for our Gold Coast trip, such an amazing location to anywhere!
Great place to explore the local area and experience the vibe, less than a 5-minute walk to the beach with an awesome view, the park is pretty well-maintained, and the receptionist Donna has been super friendly and helpful throughout our whole stay here!
Will definitely stay here again next time when we visit the Gold Coast!
Great experience here at the cabins. Staff were professional and helpful. Location perfect for what we wanted. Cabins comfy and had all we needed. Will stay again
Accommodation good  location no bad but if you have a disability very hard
Great location, would be a 10/10 if there was a pool for the kids

Caravan park that also has cabins. It is in a good location across the road from the beach, park, outdoor gym and pavilion hotel. It is super close to  walk to the Burleigh set of shops and cafes. We stayed in a cabin. They are clean and spacious, have a bbq, bathrooms and kitchen facilities. Well kept. Rooms also have foxtel. There’s a kids Entertainment room where you can play for games. On the weekend there is a coffee van on site. Parking inside using entry code. Only thing is they need some wifi!

Situated across the road to the entrance to the beach, this caravan park is ideally located in Burleigh heads.
The amenities are maintained well. Showers have good pressure.
Staff were helpful.
Loved this park so handy to everything… lovely staff awesome Management 😁well done Lara and Scott Berryman 😁
Cabin for Wedding.Two things need adding.

Stayed for the weekend in a camper & what a GREAT spot! Directly across the road from the beach & within walking distance to multiple cafes, takeaways, shops,  pubs, Surf lifesaving Club, Bowls Club etc etc..Large sites, Clean ammenities, with hot showers, Laundry + heaps of clotheslines, Camp Kitchen (in a weird spot 🤔), Entertainment zone & coffee van on site! Was actually very peaceful.

Great amenities, nice and clean.
Sites are a good size, great location
A good caravan park right in the centre of Burleigh Heads. It's nothing fancy, but the location is ideal for checking out the area.
